name: AREthGetValueDWord
title: AREthGetValueDWord
syntax: dword AREthGetValueDWord( dword objectHandle, char valuePath[] );
description: This function can be used to read out a raw value from the object specified in the objectHandle parameter. The value is accessed in this case via symbolic access paths.

parameters.name: objectHandle
parameters.description: Handle to a AUTOSAR Eth IL object, which must be completely described in the FIBEX database.The following objects are supported.

return:
Raw value
In the Event of an error, the function returns the value 0. The AREthGetLastError function can then be used to check whether the value is valid or an error has occurred.
